design_philosophy: Luxury/Swiss High-Contrast Archetype. Dark masculine color palette with steel blue/gunmetal accents. The website must feel expensive, industrial yet highly polished. Avoid pure black; use rich deep grays to reduce eye fatigue and create a premium, muted canvas for high-contrast imagery.

rules: Desaturate accent colors to avoid vibration against dark backgrounds.
Use backdrop-blur-xl with rgba glass backgrounds for sticky headers and elevated cards.
DO NOT use Inter for headings.
Use Playfair Display for all marketing headings to convey luxury and old-money B2B trust.
Use Manrope for the admin dashboard, CRM, and body copy for ultimate legibility.

marketing_site.hero_section: Min-height 90vh. Use a large, muted dark overlay (bg-black/40) over a full-screen cargo ship or port image. Content should be left-aligned or asymmetric.
marketing_site.services_grid: The 'Tetris' Grid. gap-8 or gap-12. Avoid boring equal squares. Use col-span-12 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-4 for the service cards. Cards must have the image on top, title, and short description, with generous internal padding (p-8).

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar layout. Left sidebar (w-64) with fixed position. Main content area with top header.
admin_dashboard.sidebar_menu: Links for: Dashboard (Heatmap), CRM (Clients/Visitors), Object Storage (Assets/Documents), SEO Controls, Settings, Profile.
admin_dashboard.density: High Density Grid for CRM and analytics widgets. Tight gaps (gap-4). Widgets use flat solid surfaces with 1px border (#27272A) and no heavy drop shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A7C94] text-white hover:bg-[#5A8CA4] transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: border border-[#27272A] bg-transparent text-[#F4F4F5] hover:bg-[#1A1A1D] transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium

cards.service_card: bg-[#121214] border border-[#27272A] overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#4A7C94]
cards.service_card_image: h-48 w-full object-cover filter grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500

heatmap.style: Use a custom tooltip and dark theme. Grid lines should be very subtle (#27272A). The heatmap cells should range from #121214 (empty) to #4A7C94 (high activity).

navigation.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/80 border-b border-[#27272A]. Must not be fully transparent.

motion.hover_states: All cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and their borders illuminate to the primary accent color.
motion.image_reveal: Images inside service cards transition from grayscale to full color on hover.

cargo_ship_night.description: Large container ship docked at twilight. Use for Hero Section.

freighter_ocean.description: Red and white cargo ship. Use for Import/Export Service Card.

industrial_port.description: Aerial view of shipping containers. Use for Port Logistics Service Card.

cigar_factory.description: Cigars near wooden boxes. Use for Specialty Sourcing (Cigars) Service Card.

coffee_distribution.description: Premium coffee beans. Use for Agricultural Sourcing Service Card.

warehouse_manager.description: Two workers managing inventory. Use for About Us / CRM Dashboard Placeholder.

larimar_warehouse.description: Raw minerals/gemstones. Use for Larimar Supply Service Card.

media.icons: Use lucide-react for all standard icons. For the dashboard sidebar, ensure stroke width is 1.5 for a premium, delicate look.

setup: Install Playfair Display and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Initialize Tailwind CSS with the provided custom colors.
Set up Shadcn UI for the dashboard components (Cards, Tables, Tabs, Inputs).
marketing_site_dev: Build a sticky header with glassmorphism.
Build the Hero Section using the 'cargo_ship_night' image as a background. Ensure text contrast is perfect.
Build a Services Grid where cards map to individual detail pages. Cards must feature the specified images at the top.
Implement a fully dynamic service description page template.
dashboard_dev: Create a layout wrapper with a fixed left sidebar and scrollable main content.
Sidebar must include: Settings, Profile, Object Storage (Assets/Documents), CRM, SEO Controls, Heatmap Analytics.
Build the CRM view using Shadcn Table to manage clients and visitors.
Build the Heatmap Analytics view using Recharts to visualize visitor activity.
Implement Object Storage UI (grid of documents/assets).
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure all text contrast meets WCAG AA standards. Include aria-labels on icon buttons. Provide data-testid on all interactive elements.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: NEVER use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Do NOT apply 'transition: all' globally. Target specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container in global CSS.
Use modern button styles (sharp corners or subtle 2px rounding) to fit the masculine industrial aesthetic.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯) for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit').
Missing categories = you MUST NOT use placeholder text. Use the provided image URLs.
